name: content-engine-x

scripts.build:web:vercel: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project packages/shared/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project packages/db/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project services/media/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project services/providers/sora/tsconfig.json && cd apps/web && node ../../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build

description: CONTENT ENGINE X is a production-oriented monorepo for generating, reviewing, rendering, and handing off short-form social video content.
